title: Compatibility Utility
text: Compatibility Utility The Compatibility Utility enables you to make your custom widget, implemented using a previous UX Interface version, compatible with a newer UX Interface version. It is provided as a set of JavaScript modules located by default in the following directory: uniface/webapps/ux_compatibility_utils/ Related Links UX Widget Interface Version 2 UX Widget Interface Version 2 introduces a new format for the data argument in the UX Widget Interface API functions: processLayout(), onConnect(), dataUpdate(), and dataCleanup(). This update simplifies the implementation of complex widgets with sub-widgets. Migration to Interface Version 2 To work with Interface Version 2, each UX widget or your custom widget must include the uxInterfaceVersion = 2 setting in the physical widget definition section of the web.ini file. Developers must ensure this setting is added when implementing a custom widget with Interface Version 2. How to Use the Compatibility Utility The Compatibility Utility consists of JavaScript modules located in the default installation directory: uniface/webapps/ux_compatibility_utils/. This utility ensures compatibility of the UX Widget API's data arguments with the previous interface version. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
